## 🎨 Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Include relevant motivation and context.

## 🧪 Type of Change
- [ ] 🎨 UX/UI Improvement
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility Fix
- [ ] 🚀 New Feature
- [ ] 🐛 Bug Fix
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor

## ♿ UX & Accessibility Checklist
- [ ] **Semantic HTML**: Used appropriate HTML elements (e.g., `<button>` instead of `<div>` for clickable items).
- [ ] **Keyboard Navigation**: All interactive elements are reachable and usable via keyboard.
- [ ] **ARIA Labels**: Added descriptive `aria-label` or `aria-labelledby` to icon-only buttons or complex components.
- [ ] **Color Contrast**: Verified that text and UI elements meet WCAG AA contrast standards.
- [ ] **Focus States**: All interactive elements have visible and distinct focus indicators.
- [ ] **Responsiveness**: Tested the changes on multiple screen sizes.

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)
Please provide before/after screenshots for any visual changes.
